profile.title: Profile

home.description: Validate your startup idea with evidence cross-checked across six research sources: GitHub, Tavily, Hacker News, App Store, Product Hunt, and Reddit.
home.prompt0: An AI tool that automatically summarizes meeting notes
home.prompt1: A local organic food delivery marketplace
home.prompt2: A browser extension that converts web pages into Markdown
home.prompt3: A developer tool for real-time API monitoring
home.errorLoadRecent: We couldn't load your recent reports. Please refresh the page.
home.errorStartAnalysis: We couldn't start the analysis. Please try again.

search.example: For example: "A browser extension that converts web pages into Markdown notes"
search.tooShort: Please enter at least {{min}} characters to give us enough context. (Currently {{current}})
search.tooLong: Please keep your description under {{max}} characters.

validation.missingLetters: Please include letters so we can understand the idea you want analyzed.
validation.lowSignal: Please add a bit more meaningful detail instead of short fragments or IDs.
validation.tooManySymbols: Please remove most symbols and describe the idea in words.

history.title: Research History
history.errorLoad: We couldn't load your past reports. Please refresh the page.
history.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this report? This action cannot be undone.
history.errorDelete: We couldn't delete this report. Please try again.
history.emptyState: You haven't run any research reports yet.
history.noMatch: We couldn't find any reports matching "{{query}}".

error.title: We encountered a problem
error.fallbackMessage: An unexpected error occurred. Please try reloading the page.
error.notFoundMessage: This report doesn't exist or has expired. Please start a new analysis.

sections.painPlaceholder: Pain and commercial signal analysis will appear here when available.
sections.whitespacePlaceholder: Whitespace opportunities and differentiation angles will appear here when available.

blueOcean.title: No Direct Competitors Found
blueOcean.description: We didn't find any direct competitors for your idea. This could indicate a genuine market gap.
blueOcean.step2: Look for indirect or alternative solutions
blueOcean.step3: Investigate why this hasn't been built yet

failed.title: Unable to connect to data sources
failed.description: This is typically a temporary network issue. Please wait a moment and try again.

competitors.title: Analyzed Competitors ({{count}}/{{total}})
competitors.empty: No competitors match your current filters.
competitors.virtualizedHint: Showing a large number of results. Scrolling is optimized for performance.

transparency.unavailable: Data quality metrics are currently unavailable.

confidence.title: Data Reliability Score
confidence.reasonsFallback: No specific confidence reasons were provided for this report.
confidence.suggestionHigh: We found strong data coverage. You can confidently use these insights for decision-making.
confidence.suggestionMedium: Data is limited. We recommend reviewing key assumptions manually before making major decisions.
confidence.suggestionLow: Data is insufficient. Consider running another analysis or expanding your keywords.

evidence.title: Sources & Evidence
evidence.empty: No specific evidence snippets are available for this report.

cost.title: Analysis Metrics
cost.meta: Fallback system used: {{fallbackUsed}} · Endpoints accessed: {{endpoints}} · Last encountered error: {{errorClass}}

insight.title: Differentiation Opportunities
insight.subtitle: Recommended execution angles once the build decision is positive enough.
insight.differentiationDescription: Use this as a practical wedge, not a generic product promise.

market.title: Market Overview
market.contextHint1: Read this section as timing context: what changed in the market, what demand is surfacing, and why the opportunity may be open now.
market.contextHint2: The recommendation should align with this backdrop rather than rely on competitor counts alone.

commercial.title: Demand cues that suggest paid intent
commercial.monetizationFallback: Commercial demand is visible, but packaging is still undefined.

whitespace.title: Where the market still looks under-served

fallback.description: Differentiation path surfaced even when whitespace synthesis is still sparse.
fallback.supportingPoint: Use this as the first sharp entry point.

progress.pipelineSummary: Shows the real backend event stream, source status, and structured extraction progress in one view.
progress.timelineDescription: Every line below comes from a live SSE pipeline event, not a fabricated progress estimate.
progress.timelineEmpty: Waiting for the first pipeline event.

waiting.description: The system first parses the idea, then queries six research sources in parallel, then extracts structured competitor profiles.

current.intentDescription: Identifying product type, keywords, and target scenario to build the search plan.
current.sourceDescription: Pulling candidate products, community discussion, and market signals for structured extraction.
current.extractionDescription: Compressing raw search results into comparable competitor profiles, pain points, and commercial cues.
current.aggregationDescription: Merging overlaps and combining pain, commercial, and whitespace signals into a decision-ready report.
current.completeDescription: The report payload is prepared and is about to transition into the final view.
current.failedDescription: One or more stages did not complete successfully, so the pipeline stopped here.
current.cancelledDescription: This run has been stopped and no further stages will execute.

feed.intentParsed: Captured product type and core keywords
feed.aggregationStarted: Started synthesizing market and opportunity signals

chart.title: Competitive Landscape
chart.clickHint: Click any dot to view that competitor. Larger dots indicate more available data sources.

header.copyFailed: We couldn't copy the link. Please copy it manually from your address bar.

summary.sparse: Signal extraction is still sparse, so use the recommendation with extra caution.

title.go: Should we build this? Yes, if we stay focused.
title.caution: Should we build this? Only with a narrow wedge.
title.noGo: Should we build this? Probably not yet.

subtitle.go: The opportunity looks real enough to justify moving forward with a sharp wedge.
subtitle.caution: There is signal here, but the entry point needs to be disciplined.
subtitle.noGo: The current evidence suggests the opportunity is weak or poorly timed.

error.notFoundStatus: This report doesn't exist or has expired. Please run a new analysis.
error.failedStatus: We encountered an error during analysis. Please try running it again.
error.unavailableStatus: The status of this report is temporarily unavailable.
error.connectionLost: We lost connection to the server. Click retry to reconnect.
error.restart: We couldn't restart the analysis. Please try again.
error.broaden: We couldn't start the broadened analysis.
error.extractionUnavailable: Structured extraction is unavailable. Showing raw results instead.

landing.heroDesc: One sentence about your startup idea. One auditable research report with evidence from six research sources: GitHub, Tavily, Hacker News, App Store, Product Hunt, and Reddit.
landing.mockQuery: A browser extension that converts web pages to Markdown
landing.howSubtitle: From idea to insight in minutes, not weeks.
landing.step1Desc: Tell us your startup idea in plain language. No structured forms, just your vision.
landing.step2Desc: Our AI pipeline queries six data sources: GitHub, Tavily, Hacker News, App Store, Product Hunt, and Reddit.
landing.step3Desc: Get a structured report with competitors, market gaps, and a Go / No-Go recommendation backed by evidence.
landing.featuresTitle: Built For Founders Who Move Fast
landing.feat1Desc: Cross-check signals from six research sources so your decision is not based on a single search engine.
landing.feat2Desc: Every competitor comes with source links, confidence scores, and data freshness metrics. No black-box answers.
landing.feat3Desc: Get a clear market saturation signal — not just a list of competitors, but a strategic recommendation.
landing.feat4Desc: Watch your analysis unfold live via SSE streaming. Know exactly which sources are being queried and when.
landing.ctaDesc: Stop guessing. Start building on data.

terms.acceptance: By accessing or using IdeaGo ("the Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the Service.
terms.description: IdeaGo is an AI-powered competitor research platform. We aggregate publicly available information and generate analytical reports. Reports are generated by AI and may contain inaccuracies.
terms.accounts: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials. You must not share your account or use the Service for any unlawful purpose.
terms.subscription: Paid plans are billed through Stripe. You can cancel at any time through your account settings. Refunds are handled per our refund policy.
terms.ip: Reports generated for you are yours to use. The Service, its code, and branding remain the property of IdeaGo.
terms.disclaimer: The Service is provided "as is". We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of any information provided. Use reports at your own risk.
terms.limitation: To the maximum extent permitted by law, IdeaGo shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the Service.
terms.changes: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the Service constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
terms.contact: For questions about these terms, please contact us through the channels listed on our website.

privacy.collect: We collect information you provide when creating an account (email, display name), your search queries for generating reports, and standard usage analytics (page views, feature usage).
privacy.use: We use your information to provide and improve the Service, process payments, send important account notifications, and aggregate anonymized analytics.
privacy.storage: Your data is stored securely using Supabase (PostgreSQL) with row-level security. We use HTTPS for all communications and never store payment card details - billing is handled entirely by Stripe.
privacy.sharing: We do not sell your personal data. We may share data with: Stripe (payment processing), Supabase (database hosting), and AI model providers (for report generation - queries only, not personal info).
privacy.retention: Your reports and account data are retained as long as your account is active. Anonymous (non-authenticated) reports are automatically deleted after the configured TTL. You can delete your account and all associated data at any time from your profile settings.
privacy.rights: You have the right to access, export, correct, and delete your personal data. You can delete your account from the Profile page, which will permanently remove all your data.
privacy.cookies: We use essential cookies for authentication sessions. We do not use third-party advertising or tracking cookies.
privacy.changes: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes via email or in-app notification.
privacy.contact: For privacy-related questions, please contact us through the channels listed on our website.
